title: Version Suggestion & Wrapper Compatibility Check
suggest_version_flow: getBaseReleaseCommit(): git log -n 1 --grep='chore(release): prepare v' → baseCommit hash (or null)
getCommitSubjectsSince(baseCommit): IF baseCommit null → git log -n 30 --pretty=%s ELSE git log <baseCommit>..HEAD --pretty=%s → subjects[]
[any subject matches BREAKING CHANGE or '!:' pattern] → bump='major', reason='breaking change marker'
[any subject matches '^feat:'] → bump='minor', reason='feature commit detected'
[any subject matches '^fix:|^perf:'] → bump='patch', reason='fix/perf commit detected'
[subjects empty] → bump='none', reason='no commits since base release commit'
[default] → bump='patch', reason='default to patch for non-breaking changes'
bumpSemver(baseVersion, bump): IF bump='none' → suggestedVersion=baseVersion ELSE compute new semver
ensureDir(memory/) → write memory/semver_suggestion.json with {baseVersion, baseCommit, subjects, decision, suggestedVersion}
END (exit 0 on success, exit 1 on uncaught error)
check_wrapper_compat_flow: Parse CLI args: check for --diff flag
Filter INTERFACE_CONTRACT to only entries whose file appears in changedFiles
[NO] For each requiredExport: check typeof mod[name] === 'function'
Print results: [OK] or [!!] prefix per file
[YES] Print '<N> interface(s) broken. feishu-evolver-wrapper needs update.' → exit 1
key_decisions: suggest_version: bump type determined by conventional commit prefixes (BREAKING/feat/fix/perf) in subjects since last release commit
check_wrapper_compat: --diff flag narrows scope to only git-changed files; full check otherwise
check_wrapper_compat: exit code 1 on any MISSING/BROKEN/ERROR interface; exit 0 only if all OK
key_functions: bumpSemver(base, bump): string × ('major'|'minor'|'patch'|'none') → new semver string
getChangedFiles(): → string[] of relative file paths from git diff HEAD~1
outputs: check_wrapper_compat: stdout lines per interface + exit code (0=all OK, 1=broken)
important_notes: Both scripts are standalone Node.js CLI tools. suggest_version uses conventional commit convention to auto-determine semver bump. check_wrapper_compat validates 6 critical export contracts required by the feishu-evolver-wrapper consumer package. --diff mode allows incremental checks in CI on changed files only.
